title: papaver dubium subsp. dubium
intro: Papaver dubium subsp. dubium, also known as the yellow poppy or yellow meadow poppy, is a perennial plant species within the Papaver genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Papaver dubium subsp. dubium include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and seeds are often used to create tinctures, infusions, and topical salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
